label: Ankle sprain with negative x-ray
inclusion_criteria: Fracture not seen on x-ray or fracture evaluation not concerning.
Foot is warm and well perfused.
Sensation and movement are intact at discharge.
Patient can use brace, wrap, crutches, or protected weight bearing as instructed.
exclusion_criteria: High-risk tendon rupture or unstable injury requiring urgent specialty pathway.
Child with growth plate concern requiring pediatric-specific instructions.
must_not_miss: Lisfranc injury or high ankle sprain when exam suggests it.
Infection if symptoms are not traumatic.
default_follow_up: Primary care, sports medicine, orthopedics, or urgent care follow-up in 5 to 7 days if pain or walking difficulty persists.

review.notes: First ontology slice. Needs EM clinician review before production use.
